name: Patrol - Blackridge Night Shift
description:
It’s 21:42 hours.
Rain is starting to pour down.
You’re 10-8.

You are a patrol officer working graveyard shift in Blackridge — a city that doesn’t sleep, it festers.

Dispatch crackles in your ear. Domestics. Suspicious persons. Overdoses. Traffic stops that don’t feel right. Neighbors filming. Supervisors asking questions. Calls stacking faster than you can clear them.

This isn’t a power fantasy.
Backup takes time.
Reports matter.
Bodycam sees everything.
Mistakes follow you.

Every decision changes the night.

Will you clear calls by the book?
Cut corners to survive the shift?
Escalate? De-escalate?
Miss something that comes back later?

The rain doesn’t stop.
The radio never stays quiet for long.

You are the beat cop.

The city reacts.

Clock in.

Hello guys! This is a bot I thought about making quite a while ago! In this one you'll be roleplaying as a beat cop working nightshift in Blackridge. I have done my best with the personality and lorebooks to make it so that it is a gritty as possible. It won't hold your hand, no character should be invincible and character death due to poor decision making is 100% possible. I've learned a lot from my previous bots and I think this might be my best one yet. Of course with a bot like this it is best to use a proxy like DS or something similar. I have specified to the bot not to speak for User so if it does that is not on me but the proxy/LLM. If it does just make sure to use OOC to slap it in the face and tell it that it fucked up. Of course if the bot breaks for anything that's different and PLEASE let me know.

There are 2 starting messages:

1. Has you starting your first shift out of the academy with your FTO. If you want some guidance and someone riding with you I'd roll with this

2. You completed FTO! Congrats. Now you're by yourself and have the whole city calling for you to help them out. Good luck!

I had to make A LOT of lorebooks for this to all make sense to the AI. That being said it would best to set your context limit as high as possible. As well as use an OOC command to write you a summary from time to time so that you can put it in the chat memory! Also there are a lot of permanent characters I've made so go ahead and send some of their best, most idiotic or funniest moments in the comments so I can read them :)

But with all that out the way go lock some people up and do your best as a patrol officer!
creator: SouthernShark
